name: 海豹短刀（★） | 北方森林
nameZh: 海豹短刀（★） | 北方森林
descriptionEn: A classic of the Counter-Strike series, the edge of this knife is press-fit Stellite perfectly held in place due to its precise fit with the titanium on the blade's cheek and spine. The handle is fossilized mastodon ivory held in a carbon fibre pocket. It has been painted using a forest camouflage hydrographic. The woods can be a dangerous place... never travel alone
descriptionZh: 作为反恐精英系列的经典物品，这把刀的刀锋由钴基合金压制，与钛制刀片、龙骨精准结合。整把刀浑然一体。握柄采用了碳纤维包裹的石化乳齿象牙。 这把武器使用森林迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 森林也许会是危险之地…… 不宜一人独往
